channel.title: Manusha's Daily Drive
channel.description: A personalized daily briefing on AI, anime, and your favorite creators.

item.title: Jun 11, 2026 — Anthropic Releases Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI Models to the Public
item.description: [AI] Anthropic Releases Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI Models to the Public — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9pX0VvdkNzRF9kQVpXNGtSSnRrTFhyZkxwX1pTLVZNMkJuV0tRa05URjRQaEMxUks1cEpyY0JDRTVqTkxkMk9GT01BSFFfemRYXzlia2xYemZ6X1k?oc=5 [AI] OpenAI Considers Slashing Prices in Battle with Anthropic for Users — https://news.google.?oc=5 [AI] Google AI Releases DiffusionGemma, a 26B Open-Source MoE Model Using Text Diffusion — https://news.google.?oc=5 [AI] Meta Repeatedly Delays New AI Model Release for Developers — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMif0FVX3lxTE5WcXE4c3owMGVXSjdqemxBaEhaaU51MGVQV0UzNVA0SEYxTTZqY01ESGRrZkRhdDdzSDBrbUdCVzNoN2FXdXNtOHlrdHFaU0toaTRlQ3UyWlQtcXZ0cExud08zWnJZdVZIRFFYLW1MaER4WHJYS1RxaEZQR2hpN00?oc=5 [AI] Anthropic CEO Calls for FAA-Style Regulation of Powerful AI Models — https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiygFBVV95cUxQek9ndmxod255ZDg1N0pIbVJteVdnVVVBanpFaHd3ZmhrOXhMQVpvaTdrSHhHVlZNTXR4eHFxQUs5MDgyWVYzVjVMR1ItaWlzYzNmVG10eFNNRW5PWFJTWUtHU0RqZGUxVkR2VjRJYjFNZmg3QmNGUFFuXy1tQ0xDUGNJaWZTc0hHZnVzRk55NkRySjhFWk15UXN3em5Uc3ZNMnhEc2tQNTlfZG1JUDZXYk5RSGpfMkxHQ0hDXzRGMmZjNkd4Ty12V2RR?oc=5 https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirAFBVV95cUxOYUJ0Y3ZPOE9IbWdjS0xqd20zczBOanREM3JhNmk5bVpDYlhkbFlhMTBwTWkxZ080TTEwcHJKVnhocTU3UTdBTGVmQUhrUDhqbE40bGpqS0tpQWI1RmNUMVhNTF9Kb09OYkZIanduaEN5ek1PUkdyZVRJOWxORW9fWFI4Q1Y0OWxYMk9XelRpWmJDVURweXBLT19ORl9RaWh2eWcyVkhmcGNqZ0tn?oc=5
